scripts.sync-convex: node -e "const{cpSync,existsSync}=require('fs');const src='../crochet-blueprint/convex/_generated';if(existsSync(src)){cpSync(src,'./convex/_generated',{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('Convex types synced');}else{console.log('Convex source not found, skipping sync (using committed types)');}"
